title: About Tolemi
headline: About Tolemi
subheadline: We're on a mission to help local governments make smarter, data-driven decisions.
historyBody: Tolemi was founded with a simple belief: every city deserves access to modern data tools. Too many local governments are stuck with outdated systems, manual processes, and siloed data. We started Tolemi to change that—by building a platform that connects, visualizes, and activates city data so staff can focus on what matters most: serving their communities.

milestones.event: Tolemi founded with a vision to modernize civic data infrastructure.
Launched Building Blocks, our core data platform, with three pilot cities.
Expanded to 15 cities and launched the Slate dashboard product.
Reached 50+ city partners and introduced Publicity for automated communications.
Surpassed 100 city partnerships nationwide and expanded the solutions suite.
